calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. NOVELLA COLEMAN, ESQ. of PolicyLink Legal (Tel: 510-663-4386) appearing for petitioners;
Deputy City Attorney AILEEN M. MCGRATH of the Office of the City Attorney of the City and County of San Francisco (Tel: 415-554-4691) appearing for respondents City and County of San Francisco and William Scott, in his official capacity as the San Francisco Police Department Chief;
Assistant United States Attorney BENJAMIN J. WOLINSKY of the U.S. Department of Justice - United States Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-436-6996) appearing for the United States of America.

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS Asian Americans Advancing Justice, Asian Law Caucus, Council on American-Islamic Relations, California, and American Civil Liberties Union of Northern California's Motion for Peremptory Writ of Mandate.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes under submission petitioners Asian Americans Advancing Justice?Asian Law Caucus, Council on American-Islamic Relations, California, and American Civil Liberties Union of Northern California's Motion for Peremptory Writ of Mandate.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Continued To Aug-27-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONERS ASIAN AMERICANS ADVANCING JUSTICE ASIAN LAW CAUCUS, COUNCIL ON AMERICAN-ISLAMIC RELATIONS, AND AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is continued on the court's own motion to August 27, 2019 at 9:30 a.m.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
